help.title: Help
help.feedbackComingSoon: Feedback form will be available soon.
help.appStoreComingSoon: App Store link will be available soon.
help.faq1q: Why was my natal chart calculated incorrectly?
help.faq1a: Chart calculation depends on your birth date, time, and location. You can update your birth information from Profile → Birth Information.
help.faq2q: Why didn't my dream interpretation complete?
help.faq2a: AI interpretations may take a few minutes. You can check the status by opening the relevant entry from the Dreams tab. If the issue persists, restart the app.
help.faq3q: Why didn't my voice recording upload?
help.faq3a: Check if microphone permission is granted. Recording should not exceed 30 seconds. Check your internet connection.
help.faq4a: iOS: Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions → Mystic AI. Android: Play Store → Account → Subscriptions → Mystic AI.
help.faq5q: How can I delete my data?
help.faq5a: Send an email to support@mystic.ai with the subject "Account Deletion Request" for account and all data deletion.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.yourDataInControl: Your data is under your control
privacy.section1Body: Mystic AI collects birth date, time and location, dream entries, and app usage statistics. This data is used only to provide personalized astrology and dream interpretations.
privacy.section2Body: All your data is transmitted over encrypted connections (TLS) and stored on secure servers. Passwords are never stored in plain text; they are hashed with bcrypt.
privacy.section3Body: Your data is not sold to third parties. Only anonymous content is sent to the model used for generating AI interpretations.
privacy.section4Body: You can delete your account and all data at any time. Contact support@mystic.ai for data access and deletion requests.
privacy.section5Body: The mobile app uses only anonymous session data for analytics. No advertising tracking cookies are used.
